name: Soni-Ani: Super Sonico The Animation
original_name: そにアニ -SUPER SONICO THE ANIMATION-
overview: "Super Sonico" debuted as Nitro+'s live mascot girl, and her world will be brought to life in the anime, "SoniAni - SUPER SONICO THE ANIMATION -"!
